Gay mens popular fiction collection, 1931-1992.
Collection Number: 7456

Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Library

DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY

Title:
Gay mens popular fiction collection, 1931-1992.
Repository:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Collection Number:
7456
Abstract:
Erotic and pornographic novels on gay men's subjects, including such themes as muscle, cowboy, sado-masochism, sailors, and leather, and occurring in such series as Parisian Press, Blueboy Library, Greenleaf, HIS 69, and many others.
Creator:
Quanitities:
37.6 cubic feet.
Language:
Collection material in English
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION

Erotic and pornographic novels on gay men's subjects, including such themes as muscle, cowboy, sado-masochism, sailors, and leather, and occurring in such series as Parisian Press, Blueboy Library, Greenleaf, HIS 69, and many others.
RELATED MATERIALS

Collecting Program: Human Sexuality Collection.
INFORMATION FOR USERS
Cite As:

Gay men's popular fiction collection, #7456. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
SUBJECTS

Subjects:
Popular literature.
Gay men -- Fiction.
Form and Genre Terms:
Pulp fiction
Pornography.
Erotica.
